title: Frost Melt
hook: Melt the ice, free the treasure
idea: Satisfying melt-and-reveal. A frozen artifact is encased in ice; the player drags a heat tool (torch / heat cannon / laser) over it and the ice melts away layer-by-layer via a pixel mask, REVEALING the artifact frozen inside. Fully melt to free it, add it to a COLLECTION (fossils, gems, relics, mammoth bones), earn coins, and upgrade the heat tool, then thaw harder ice and rarer artifacts.
origin: Manual 2-game batch 2026-06-07 (Tim, sourced from gardenofdreams.games 'Meltopia'). A reskin of the relic_restore reveal engine to heat-melt-reveal with an artifact collection meta.
differentiation: Heat-melt reveal (vs scrub/wash) with an artifact COLLECTION meta and a heat-tool ladder (torch -> heat cannon -> laser). The collect-a-set goal gives a longer-term reason to return than single-surface cleaners.
